title: Skill Doctor Case Report
description: Schema for skill failure case reports. Only engineering-level information is permitted. No business content, user data, or identifying information.

case_id.description: Unique case ID in format YYYY-MM-DD-xxxxxx

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the failure occurred

platform.description: Which AI agent platform was being used

skill_triggered.description: Name of the skill that was triggered (or 'none')

skill_version.description: Version of the skill if known

other_active_skills.description: List of other skills that were loaded/active at the time

failure_signature.description: Abstract engineering description of the failure. MUST NOT contain business content, file names, URLs, company names, or user-specific data.

context_note.description: Relevant context constraints (e.g. 'long conversation', 'many skills loaded')

user_correction.description: Abstract description of what the user did to fix the issue. E.g. 'user manually specified markdown output' — NOT 'user asked for the Q3 report in markdown'

remedy.description: Recommended fix for this failure pattern

verified.description: Whether this case has been verified by a human reviewer
